markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Vinnie Pasquantino is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Vinnie Pasquantino starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Vinnie Pasquantino is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Vinnie Pasquantino is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
